questions.question: If A = {1, 2} and B = {3, 4}, then the number of elements in A × B is:
questions.subject: Mathematics

questions.question: The domain of the function f(x) = √x is:
questions.explanation: The square root is defined for all non-negative real numbers, so domain is [0, ∞).
questions.subject: Mathematics

questions.question: A relation R from set A to set B is a subset of:
questions.explanation: By definition, a relation R from A to B is any subset of the Cartesian product A × B.
questions.subject: Mathematics
